notes: VIX moderate at 18.1 with constructive tape on chip rebound and Iran-Israel ceasefire, but BofA's 'take profits' warning and an upcoming May CPI print plus rate-hike repricing argue for measured sizing.
journal_entry: Starting flat with full cash. Calm-ish open but CPI later this week and a strong jobs report pushing rate expectations up — watching CPI release for a volatility spike, keeping risk dialed to 0.7 until macro data clears.
